metadata.description: Olym multi-agent dev OS as a Claude Code plugin. 5-layer architecture (Identity / Knowledge / Protocol / Tooling / Pipeline) + Greek persona fleet. Single-plugin marketplace — this repo is both the marketplace registry and the hello-olym plugin itself.

plugins.name: hello-olym
plugins.description: Olym dev OS — 7 workflow skills + 2 subagents + 2 slash commands + 3 session hooks. Dogfood at 0.3.x-alpha; single-version policy with @manidala/olym-core + olym-runtime.
